title: gnaphalium alpinum
intro: Gnaphalium alpinum, also known as alpine cudweed or mountain everlasting, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family Asteraceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly as an anti-inflammatory and antiseptic agent, due to its high content of sesquiterpene lactones and flavonoids. The health benefits of Gnaphalium alpinum include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of this plant are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can be used to treat various health issues, such as wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory problems.
